title: Designing a Conversational Dialogue System with Context-Aware Dialog Management
scenario: Design a conversational dialogue system that uses context-aware dialog management to handle user conversations and provide relevant information. The system must be able to recognize user intent, maintain context, and provide accurate responses. The output should be a Python script (as code) implementing the context-aware dialog management algorithm. Constraints: Must use a NLP library (e.g., NLTK), must use a machine learning library (e.g., scikit-learn), and must be under 400 lines of code. The evaluation criteria are: (1) accuracy of user intent recognition (40 points), (2) accuracy of context maintenance (25 points), (3) effectiveness of response generation (20 points), (4) maintainability of code (5 points), and (5) adherence to best practices (10 points).
constraints: Must use a NLP library (e.g., NLTK)
Must use a machine learning library (e.g., scikit-learn)
Must be under 400 lines of code

evaluationCriteria.description: Evaluates the accuracy of user intent recognition using NLP techniques.
Assesses the accuracy of context maintenance in user conversations.
Checks the effectiveness of response generation in providing accurate and relevant information.
Evaluates the maintainability of the code in terms of readability, modularity, and testability.
Checks if the code adheres to best practices in terms of security, performance, and code organization.
